name: aionforge-memory
description: Agent skills for using an externally configured Aionforge Memory MCP server as durable project memory.

interface.shortDescription: Durable memory workflows for agent sessions
interface.longDescription: Use Aionforge Memory through an existing MCP server with small skills for recall, capture, and session handoff.
defaultPrompt: Use Aionforge Memory as the working substrate for this task.
Search memory before planning, then capture durable facts (decisions, fixes, validation, handoffs) the moment they land, not batched to the end.
Track tasks, blockers, and TODOs as work items with work_create then work_advance as status changes. Tasks are work items, not memory episodes; there is no note to store directly.
